NAVAREA XIX 122/16
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 301830 UTC DEC 16.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 
72-12.7N - 019-46.5E LEIV EIRIKSSON
66-04.3N - 008-03.6E DEEPSEA BERGEN
65-22.3N - 007-21.4E SONGA ENCOURAGE

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT
WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 118/16
